3170930.name: Market Mania
3170930.description: Manage your very own grocery store. Where you can hire, work with, and of course Fire employees. Work with your friends or alone in this economic endeavor. Deal with customers as you work your way up the wealth ladder to success. Play with up to 4 of your friends in online co-op. Or drown alone in debt. Your choice! Worst case scenario get a loan! just watch out for the sharks! Stop Robbers and keep the Place clean! as you raise your popularity to reach the highest level of success!
3170930.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
